plan.title: DEFT Evolution — Unified CRM & Community Platform
plan.author: interview-agent

narratives.Overview: DEFT Evolution is a unified CRM and community platform built on a hierarchical threaded content model (Org → Space → Board → Thread → Message). Pre-sales teams manage leads, pipelines, and opportunities in dedicated Spaces/Boards. Converted customers receive their own Org with Spaces for support, feature requests, and documentation. Developers and customers collaborate in community Spaces. The Spaces API is the foundational layer — built first — with all domain-specific behavior layered on top via metadata conventions and UI views.
narratives.Background: The platform targets B2B technical sales cycles (lead qualification, nurturing, demos, trials, conversion) and extends into developer community engagement (forums, wikis, tickets, feature requests). Built on the STRONG architecture: SQLite, TypeScript, React, Opinionated Next.js, Go.
narratives.Constraint: Backend MUST be complete with full test coverage (unit, fuzzing ≥50/input, integration, e2e, smoke, gate; ≥85% coverage) before any frontend work begins. All CRM entities modeled as Threads with domain-specific metadata. SQLite single-file for MVP; PostgreSQL migration path preserved. Voice integration deferred — stub interface only.
narratives.Risk: SQLite single-file limits horizontal scaling. FTS5 + generated columns add schema complexity. Full webhook system with replay is significant scope. Tiptap + mermaid editor integration has frontend complexity.
narratives.Alternative: Considered PostgreSQL (deferred for simplicity), Gin router (chose Chi for net/http compatibility), gorilla/websocket (chose nhooyr for context.Context support), Clerk Organizations (chose auth-only for RBAC flexibility).

stack.frontend: Next.js 14+ (App Router, RSC, TypeScript), shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS
stack.database: SQLite (WAL mode, FTS5, JSON + generated columns)

decisions.metadata_storage: JSON + generated columns for hot paths
decisions.slugs: auto-generated, unique per parent, numeric suffix on collision
decisions.rbac_resolution: explicit override with parent fallback (configurable via YAML policy file)
decisions.deletion: soft delete (deleted_at), GDPR hard-purge admin endpoint
decisions.file_limits: 100MB max; images, docs, text, archives, video, audio
decisions.webhooks: full system: event filtering, HMAC-SHA256, delivery log, replay
decisions.search: FTS5 all levels + combined metadata filtering
decisions.notifications: provider abstraction: in-app (DB+WS), email (Resend), digests; extensible to Slack/Teams/SMS
decisions.audit_log: every mutation: who, what, when, before/after JSON diff, IP, request ID
decisions.lead_scoring: hybrid: rule-based baseline + LLM enrichment (Grok default, provider-agnostic interface)
decisions.crm_pipeline: new_lead → qualified → demo_scheduled → demo_completed → proposal_sent → negotiation → closed_won/closed_lost + nurturing; per-org configurable
decisions.moderation: pin, lock, hide, move, merge; user flagging + moderator queue
decisions.theming: system pref + toggle + per-org branding via CSS custom properties
decisions.markdown: Tiptap WYSIWYG (GFM, mermaid, syntax highlight, raw toggle); stored as markdown; rendered via react-markdown

narrative.Overview: Establish monorepo, Go module, Docker Compose, Taskfile, CI skeleton, config system, HTTP server foundation with Chi, and core helpers (RFC 7807, cursor pagination, health checks).

subItems.title: Initialize monorepo structure (/api, /web, /docker, /docs, /api/internal/{domain}/, /api/config, /api/cmd/server)
Initialize Go module with dependencies (chi, gorm, modernc sqlite, testify, nhooyr websocket, otel, google/uuid)
Docker Compose for local dev (Go API with hot reload, SQLite volume, web placeholder)
Taskfile with build, test, test:coverage, lint, fmt, check, dev tasks
GitHub Actions CI skeleton (run task check on push/PR, fail on coverage < 85%)
Environment config loading (server port, SQLite path, Clerk keys, log level, CORS, upload dir/max, OTel endpoint)
RBAC policy YAML config (/api/config/rbac-policy.yaml): resolution strategy, role hierarchy, defaults
Chi router with middleware stack (slog logging, request ID, panic recovery, CORS, content-type enforcement, /v1 subrouter)
RFC 7807 error response helpers (not_found, unauthorized, forbidden, validation_error, conflict, internal_error)
Cursor pagination helpers (encode/decode UUIDv7 cursor, parse ?cursor&limit, default 50 max 100)
Health check endpoints (GET /healthz, GET /readyz with SQLite connectivity check)
Phase 1 tests: unit tests for config, RBAC policy, RFC 7807, pagination, health. Fuzzing ≥50 per input (cursor decode, config). Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Define all GORM models, SQLite schema with JSON metadata, generated columns, FTS5 virtual tables, supporting models (memberships, audit, revisions, webhooks, notifications, votes, uploads, API keys).

subItems.title: BaseModel: UUIDv7 PK, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt, DeletedAt (soft delete). GORM hooks for auto UUIDv7.
Org model: Name, Slug (unique), Description, Metadata JSON, generated columns (billing_tier, payment_status)
Space model: OrgID FK, Name, Slug (unique within org), Description, Metadata, Type enum (general/crm/support/community/knowledge_base)
Board model: SpaceID FK, Name, Slug (unique within space), Description, Metadata, IsLocked
Thread model: BoardID FK, Title, Body (markdown), Slug, Metadata JSON, AuthorID, IsPinned, IsLocked, VoteScore. Generated columns: status, priority, stage, assigned_to.
Message model: ThreadID FK, Body (markdown), AuthorID, Metadata JSON, Type enum (note/email/call_log/comment/system)
Membership models: OrgMembership, SpaceMembership, BoardMembership. Role enum (viewer→owner). Composite unique (UserID, EntityID).
API key model: OrgID FK, Name, KeyHash (SHA-256), KeyPrefix, Permissions JSON, LastUsedAt, ExpiresAt
Audit log model: UserID, Action enum, EntityType, EntityID, BeforeState JSON, AfterState JSON, IPAddress, RequestID. Immutable.
Revision model: EntityType, EntityID, Version (auto-increment per entity), PreviousContent JSON, EditorID
Webhook models: Subscription (polymorphic scope, URL, Secret encrypted, EventFilter JSON). Delivery (SubscriptionID, EventType, Payload, StatusCode, Attempts, NextRetryAt).
Notification models: Notification (UserID, Type, Title, Body, EntityRef, IsRead). NotificationPreference (per channel per event). DigestSchedule.
Vote model: ThreadID, UserID, Weight (computed). Unique (ThreadID, UserID). Thread.VoteScore aggregated.
Upload model: OrgID, EntityType, EntityID, Filename, ContentType, Size, StoragePath, UploaderID
FTS5 virtual tables for orgs, spaces, boards, threads, messages with sync triggers on insert/update/delete
Database indexes: FKs, slugs, generated columns, membership composites, audit entity refs, webhook delivery, notifications
Phase 2 tests: all model CRUD, FTS5 sync, fuzzing ≥50 per (metadata JSON, slug generation, UUIDv7). Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Clerk JWT validation, RBAC engine with configurable policy-based resolution (explicit override + parent fallback), API key authentication, dual-auth middleware.

subItems.title: Clerk JWT validation middleware: JWKS fetch/cache, signature/expiry/issuer validation, user_id extraction to context
RBAC resolution engine: load policy from YAML, resolve effective role (board → space → org fallback), role hierarchy permissions
Permission check middleware: extract entity IDs from URL, resolve role, check required permission, 403 RFC 7807 on denial
API key CRUD (create/list/revoke) and auth middleware (X-API-Key header, hash lookup, permission/expiry check)
Dual-auth middleware: accept either Clerk JWT or API key, set unified user context
Phase 3 tests: JWT (valid/expired/wrong issuer/malformed), RBAC (all resolution paths), permissions (every endpoint × role), API keys. Fuzzing ≥50 per (JWT, API key). Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Full CRUD for the hierarchical model: Orgs, Spaces, Boards, Threads (with metadata filtering), Messages, and Memberships. Each domain: handler → service → repository in /api/internal/{domain}/.

subItems.title: Org repository/service/handlers: POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE /v1/orgs. Slug+ID URLs, metadata deep-merge PATCH, cursor pagination, RBAC.
Space CRUD nested under org: /v1/orgs/{org}/spaces. Slug unique within org. Type enum.
Board CRUD nested under space. Lock/unlock endpoints. Locked boards reject new threads.
Thread CRUD: metadata filtering (?metadata[status]=open&metadata[priority][gt]=3), deep-merge PATCH, pin/unpin, lock/unlock, revision on update.
Message CRUD nested under thread. Author-only update (creates revision). Type enum. Locked threads reject create.
Membership CRUD at org/space/board levels. Add/remove/update role. List members. Invitation flow. Cannot remove last owner.

Phase 4 tests: full lifecycle integration (org→space→board→thread→message), RBAC every endpoint × role, metadata filtering, pagination, slug, soft delete. Fuzzing ≥50 per (request body, metadata filters). Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Full-text search with metadata combo, file uploads with storage abstraction, webhook system (subscriptions, event bus, delivery engine, replay), audit logging, revision history endpoints.

subItems.title: Search: GET /v1/search with FTS5 + metadata filters, RBAC filtering, scope/type filters, ranked results with snippets, cursor pagination.
StorageProvider interface (Store/Get/Delete) + LocalStorage implementation. File type + size (100MB) validation.
Upload endpoints: POST /v1/uploads (multipart), GET /v1/uploads/{id}, DELETE. RBAC on parent entity.
Internal event bus (in-process pub/sub). All mutations publish typed events. Webhook + notification engines subscribe.
Webhook subscription CRUD at org/space/board scope. URL + encrypted secret + event filter. HMAC-SHA256.
Webhook delivery engine: match subs, sign HMAC, POST, retry 3x exponential backoff, log all attempts.
Webhook delivery dashboard API (GET deliveries) and manual replay endpoint.
Audit middleware: capture before/after state on every mutation, async write. GET /v1/orgs/{org}/audit-log with filters.
Revision history endpoints: GET revisions list and specific version for threads and messages.

Phase 5 tests: search integration, upload lifecycle, webhook e2e (create sub → event → verify delivery), audit captures all mutations. Fuzzing ≥50 per (search query, webhook URL, file type). Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: WebSocket hub (nhooyr) with RBAC-scoped channels, notification provider abstraction with in-app (DB+WS) and email (Resend) implementations, digest scheduling, trigger engine.

subItems.title: WebSocket upgrade (GET /v1/ws), JWT auth, hub/channel manager (board:{id}, thread:{id}), RBAC on subscribe, ping/pong keepalive.
Event broadcasting: subscribe to event bus, broadcast message.created/thread.updated/typing to scoped channels, permission filtered.
NotificationProvider interface + InApp implementation: DB storage, WS push, CRUD endpoints (list/mark-read/mark-all-read).
Email provider (Resend): transactional templates (React Email) for new message, @mention, stage change, assignment, invite. User preferences.
Digest email: background goroutine, aggregate unreads, render summary, send via Resend. Daily/weekly configurable.
Notification trigger engine: event bus → map to notification types → determine recipients (@mentions, thread participants) → route per preferences.
Phase 6 tests: WS lifecycle integration, notification routing all event types, digest generation, mock provider. Fuzzing ≥50 per (WS message, notification payload). Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Sales pipeline with configurable stages and transition validation, hybrid lead scoring (rule-based + LLM via Grok), and fully automated lead-to-customer provisioning on Closed-Won.

subItems.title: Pipeline config: default stages (new_lead→closed_won/closed_lost + nurturing), transition validation, per-org customization, stage change events.
Rule-based scoring engine: config-driven rules (metadata conditions → points), score on metadata change, per-org rules.
LLM enrichment: LLMProvider interface (Summarize, SuggestNextAction), GrokProvider impl, POST .../threads/{thread}/enrich, results in metadata.
Automated provisioning on closed_won: create Org, default Spaces/Boards, Clerk invite, CRM thread link, FlexPoint customer. Transaction with rollback. Confirmation message.
Phase 7 tests: full sales lifecycle integration (lead→score→enrich→close→provision), LLM mocked. Fuzzing ≥50 per (stage transitions, scoring). Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: BillingProvider interface with FlexPoint implementation. Customer CRUD, invoice management, payment status sync, FlexPoint webhook handler. Billing metadata on Org.

subItems.title: BillingProvider interface (CreateCustomer, CreateInvoice, GetPaymentStatus, HandleWebhook) + FlexPoint implementation. Billing metadata on Org. Webhook endpoint for FlexPoint events.
Phase 8 tests: billing lifecycle integration, FlexPoint mocked, webhook handling, metadata updates. Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Weighted voting (role + billing tier weights, configurable) and role-based moderation (pin/lock/hide/move/merge, flagging with moderator queue).

subItems.title: Vote CRUD: POST toggle, weight from role+billing tier, atomic VoteScore update, sort by votes, configurable weight table.
Moderation actions: pin/lock/hide/move/merge threads. Flag system: any user flags, moderator queue (GET /v1/orgs/{org}/flags), resolve/dismiss. All audit logged.
Phase 9 tests: voting lifecycle, moderation e2e, thread move/merge integrity, concurrent voting, flag workflow. Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Stubbed VoiceProvider interface, GDPR hard purge and data export endpoints, OpenTelemetry SDK instrumentation.

subItems.title: VoiceProvider interface (LogCall, GetTranscript, Escalate) + stub. Call log model. Support thread creation/update on call events.
GDPR: DELETE /v1/admin/users/{user}/purge (remove PII, anonymize audit). GET /v1/admin/users/{user}/export (JSON archive). DELETE /v1/admin/orgs/{org}/purge (cascade). Owner-only.
OpenTelemetry: traces for HTTP requests + DB queries, custom metrics (request count, latency, WS connections, webhook success rate), configurable exporter.
Phase 10 tests: GDPR purge across all tables, data export completeness, voice stub, OTel spans. Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Initialize Next.js 14+ with TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Clerk frontend auth, typed API client, theming system (dark/light + per-org), and base layout (sidebar, top bar, breadcrumbs). MUST NOT begin until all backend phases (1-10) are complete and tested.
narrative.Constraint: Blocked until Phases 1–10 all pass with ≥85% coverage.

subItems.title: Initialize Next.js 14+ in /web: App Router, strict TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, ESLint+Prettier, Vitest (≥85% threshold).
Clerk frontend: @clerk/nextjs, ClerkProvider, middleware for protected routes, sign-in/sign-up pages, JWT forwarded to Go API.
Typed API client: RSC direct fetch with JWT, Client Component fetch wrapper for mutations, types matching Go API responses.
Theming: CSS custom properties, dark/light via Tailwind dark: + system pref + manual toggle (localStorage), per-org overrides from org metadata.
Base layout: sidebar (org/space/board nav), top bar (search, notification bell, user menu, theme toggle), responsive, breadcrumbs.
Phase 11 tests: layout, theme toggle, auth redirect components. Vitest + RTL. Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: CRUD views for Org/Space/Board/Thread/Message, Tiptap editor with GFM+mermaid+syntax+raw toggle, file upload UI, real-time message updates via WebSocket.

subItems.title: Org/Space/Board list, create, and settings pages with name/description/metadata forms.
Thread list (filtering, sorting, cursor pagination) and detail (title, body, metadata sidebar, message timeline).
Tiptap editor for messages: GFM, mermaid (live preview), syntax-highlighted code, image upload, raw markdown toggle. Edit creates revision. Revision history viewable.
File upload UI: drag-drop, progress indicator, client-side type/size validation, image preview, download links.
Phase 12 tests: component tests, Playwright E2E (sign in → org → space → board → thread → message → edit). Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Kanban pipeline (drag-drop stage transitions), lead detail with score breakdown and AI enrichment, scoring dashboard.

subItems.title: Kanban pipeline: columns = stages, cards = leads with metadata (company, value, assigned_to, score), drag-drop transitions, filters.
Lead detail: metadata sidebar, activity timeline, score breakdown (contributing rules), AI enrichment section (summary, next action, Enrich button). Dashboard stats.
Phase 13 tests: Kanban drag-drop, Playwright E2E sales lifecycle (lead→pipeline→close→provision visible). Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Voting UI, moderation dashboard (flag queue, mod actions), webhook management (CRUD, delivery log, replay), billing dashboard, audit log viewer, membership management.

subItems.title: Voting UI (toggle, weighted score, sort), moderation dashboard (flag queue, resolve/dismiss, pin/lock/hide/move/merge actions).
Admin views: webhook CRUD + delivery log + replay, billing dashboard (tier, status, invoices), audit log viewer with diff, membership management.
Phase 14 tests: component tests, Playwright E2E community flow (feature request → vote → flag → moderate). Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: WebSocket client with auto-connect, real-time message updates, typing indicators, notification bell with unread count, feed dropdown, preferences page.

subItems.title: WS client (connect on auth, subscribe to channels), real-time messages in thread view, typing indicators, notification bell + unread badge, feed dropdown, preferences page, digest frequency.
Phase 15 tests: notification components, Playwright E2E (post message → verify real-time in another session), preferences save/load. Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Dockerfile (multi-stage), Docker Compose finalized, Fly.io config (persistent volume, health checks), Vercel config, CI/CD finalization, end-to-end smoke tests against all MVP acceptance criteria.

subItems.title: Dockerfile (multi-stage Go build), Docker Compose (full stack), fly.toml (persistent volume, health checks, scaling), Vercel config, env var documentation.
GitHub Actions: PR → Go tests+lint+coverage + Next.js tests+lint+typecheck. Merge → deploy to Fly.io + Vercel. Coverage gates ≥85%. Rollback on failure.
Playwright E2E smoke suite: all MVP acceptance criteria (org→thread→message, RBAC, sales flow, provisioning, billing, community). Run against local Docker + production. API/UI < 2s.
